system.description:
Discipline: Dianxue
Skill: Arm Strike against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You press a series of accupoints on the victim, blocking the flow of Qi through the little known Phoenix Star meridian points damaging their vital energies. On a Success, the victim has one point of Hardiness drained for one minute per Rank of Dianxue, but suffers no Damage from the Attack. On a Total Success, 2 points are drained instead of one. This Attack may not be performed multiple times on the same target. Cathartic: The Hardiness Drain is for one hour per Rank of Dianxue instead (one day per Rank of Dianxue during the Phoenix Moon). Additionally, the arm attack deals normal Damage as usual.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.targetDrainsNote: Normal drain lasts 1 minute per Rank of Dianxue. Cathartic drain lasts 1 hour per Rank of Dianxue, or 1 day per Rank of Dianxue during the Phoenix Moon.
system.catharticEffect: The Hardiness Drain is for one hour per Rank of Dianxue instead (one day per Rank of Dianxue during the Phoenix Moon). Additionally, the arm attack deals normal Damage as usual.
